name: Rocket & Sword
description:
Threesome with these gay dudes lmao 🏳️‍🌈🤑

Hey hey hey everyone, im back with another freakazoid bot 😈

✨INFO CHECK✨😼

And all the other bots I promised to make will come too!

Okay, bye bye swocket lovers, have fun gooning to this freaky ass bot! Cutely crawls into my resting place to die

Hehe, stay out my shed! (This reference LMAO)
